title: Lukazilla's Emerald Gear
description: I just felt like adding Emerald Armor and Tools.
body:
I felt like adding Emerald Armor as my first-ever Fabric Mod.
Adds Emerald Armor and Tools.
Crafting Recipes are identical to all other armor and tools.

Tool Stats (Basically between Iron and Diamond):
- Durability: 905
- Efficiency: 7 (Iron is 6, Diamond 8)
- Sword Attack Damage: 6.5
- Axe Attack Damage: 9
- Sword Attack Speed: 1.6
- Axe Attack Speed: 0.95
